property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Users\CC\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\A_Sof\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.18.8-hotspot\bin;D:\A_Sof\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-15.2.0-mingw-w64msvcrt-13.0.0-r1\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\CC\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\Scripts\;C:\Users\CC\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310\;C:\Users\CC\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\CC\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;D:\A_Sof\idea\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1.1.1\bin;;C:\Users\CC\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testSelectByCondition
testDeleteByIds
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：批量删除 ===== 20:30:24.596 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO employee (emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 20:30:24.597 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Parameters: 批量删除测试1(String), 21(Integer), F(String), batch1@example.com(String), 测试部(String) 20:30:24.599 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - <== Updates: 1 20:30:24.602 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO employee (emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 20:30:24.604 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Parameters: 批量删除测试2(String), 22(Integer), F(String), batch2@example.com(String), 测试部(String) 20:30:24.605 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - <== Updates: 1 20:30:24.606 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO employee (emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 20:30:24.607 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Parameters: 批量删除测试3(String), 23(Integer), F(String), batch3@example.com(String), 测试部(String) 20:30:24.607 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - <== Updates: 1 插入的测试数据ID：[14, 15, 16] 20:30:24.614 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.EmployeeMapper.deleteByIds - ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM employee WHERE id IN ( ? , ? , ? ) 20:30:24.614 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.EmployeeMapper.deleteByIds - ==> Parameters: 14(Integer), 15(Integer), 16(Integer) 20:30:24.615 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.EmployeeMapper.deleteByIds - <== Updates: 3 删除行数：3 20:30:24.620 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.620 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 14(Integer) 20:30:24.621 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 0 20:30:24.622 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.622 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 15(Integer) 20:30:24.623 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 0 20:30:24.623 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.624 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 16(Integer) 20:30:24.624 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 0 测试通过！

testcase.name: testUpdateDynamic
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：动态更新 ===== 20:30:24.625 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.625 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 1(Integer) 20:30:24.627 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 1 原始数据：Employee{id=1, empName='张三（已修改）', empAge=30, empGender='M', empEmail='zhangsan_new@example.com', empDept='研发部'} 20:30:24.628 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.EmployeeMapper.updateDynamic - ==> Preparing: UPDATE employee SET emp_name = ?, emp_email = ? WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.628 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.EmployeeMapper.updateDynamic - ==> Parameters: 张三（动态更新）(String), dynamic_update@example.com(String), 1(Integer) 20:30:24.629 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.EmployeeMapper.updateDynamic - <== Updates: 1 更新行数：1 20:30:24.633 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.633 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 1(Integer) 20:30:24.637 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 1 更新后数据：Employee{id=1, empName='张三（动态更新）', empAge=30, empGender='M', empEmail='dynamic_update@example.com', empDept='研发部'} 测试通过！

testcase.name: testSelectAll
testUpdateById
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：根据 id 修改员工信息 ===== 20:30:24.643 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.updateById - ==> Preparing: UPDATE employee SET emp_name = ?, emp_age = ?, emp_gender = ?, emp_email = ?, emp_dept = ? WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.643 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.updateById - ==> Parameters: 张三（已修改）(String), 30(Integer), M(String), zhangsan_new@example.com(String), 研发部(String), 1(Integer) 20:30:24.645 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.updateById - <== Updates: 1 修改行数：1 20:30:24.648 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.649 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 1(Integer) 20:30:24.650 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 1 修改后的员工信息：Employee{id=1, empName='张三（已修改）', empAge=30, empGender='M', empEmail='zhangsan_new@example.com', empDept='研发部'} 测试通过！

testcase.name: testSelectByNameLike
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：根据姓名模糊查询（实体类传参） ===== 20:30:24.651 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByNameLike - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%') 20:30:24.652 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByNameLike - ==> Parameters: 张(String) 20:30:24.653 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByNameLike - <== Total: 1 姓名包含'张'的员工数量：1 Employee{id=1, empName='张三（已修改）', empAge=30, empGender='M', empEmail='zhangsan_new@example.com', empDept='研发部'} 测试通过！

testcase.name: testSelectByIdWithResultMap
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：使用 resultMap 查询员工 ===== 20:30:24.654 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByIdWithResultMap - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.656 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByIdWithResultMap - ==> Parameters: 1(Integer) 20:30:24.657 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByIdWithResultMap - <== Total: 1 使用 resultMap 查询结果：Employee{id=1, empName='张三（已修改）', empAge=30, empGender='M', empEmail='zhangsan_new@example.com', empDept='研发部'} 测试通过！

testcase.name: testSelectByNameAndDept
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：根据姓名 + 部门精确查询 ===== 20:30:24.660 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByNameAndDept - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE emp_name = ? AND emp_dept = ? 20:30:24.661 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByNameAndDept - ==> Parameters: 张三(String), 技术部(String) 20:30:24.661 [main] DEBUG c.e.m.E.selectByNameAndDept - <== Total: 0 查询结果数量：0 测试通过！

testcase.name: testSelectByAgeAndGender
testDeleteById
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：根据 id 删除员工 ===== 20:30:24.667 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO employee (emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 20:30:24.667 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Parameters: 待删除员工(String), 25(Integer), F(String), delete@example.com(String), 临时部(String) 20:30:24.668 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - <== Updates: 1 插入的待删除员工ID：17 20:30:24.671 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.deleteById - ==> Preparing: DELETE FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.672 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.deleteById - ==> Parameters: 17(Integer) 20:30:24.672 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.deleteById - <== Updates: 1 删除行数：1 20:30:24.675 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.676 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 17(Integer) 20:30:24.678 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 0 删除后查询结果：null 测试通过！

testcase.name: testInsert
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：添加员工 ===== 20:30:24.680 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO employee (emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 20:30:24.680 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - ==> Parameters: 测试员工(String), 26(Integer), M(String), test@example.com(String), 测试部(String) 20:30:24.681 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.insert - <== Updates: 1 插入行数：1 返回的自增主键ID：18 测试通过！

testcase.name: testSelectById
testcase.system-out: ===== 测试：根据 id 查询员工 ===== 20:30:24.684 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Preparing: SELECT id, emp_name, emp_age, emp_gender, emp_email, emp_dept FROM employee WHERE id = ? 20:30:24.685 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - ==> Parameters: 1(Integer) 20:30:24.686 [main] DEBUG c.e.mapper.EmployeeMapper.selectById - <== Total: 1 查询结果：Employee{id=1, empName='张三（已修改）', empAge=30, empGender='M', empEmail='zhangsan_new@example.com', empDept='研发部'} 测试通过！
